one_time_description: Elkhorn Ranch land settlement distribution of $22,148,600 recorded as Rights and title expense
economic_notes: akisq'nuk is one of four communities of the Ktunaxa Nation. Operates Lakeshore Resort and Campground. Holds interests in KHLP, SHL, SDC, SEMHL, BCFN Gaming Revenue LP. Advanced $1,000,000 loan to SHL for SEM Resort. Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership is a GBP earning forestry-related revenue.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Large one-time item: Elkhorn Ranch land settlement of $21,000,000 received and $22,148,600 distributed, causing a deficit of $10,876,826 versus a prior year surplus of $30,673,808. Prior year large ISC receivable of $28,276,289 collected in current year. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Eva Joseph Early Learning & Cultural Society, Akisq'nuk Housing Society, 1285651 BC Ltd. Two GBEs: Akisq'nuk Natural Resource Corporation and 0910003 BC Ltd. One GBP: Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text. Salaries total not separately disclosed in available text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + BC + Ktunaxa Nation Council + FNHA + Other FN funding + Grants + IMBA + CMHC = 1975365+8962750+20000+721538+481387+529669+803076+145665.
